artPrompt: An evocative scene of unseen croupier hands raking a glittering pile of gold treasure off a rigged carnival table toward a shadowed cashbox, coins cascading in foreshortened streaks toward the viewer. A wheel of fortune and tattered red tents blaze behind in hot gold and sickly neon, dice scattered, ember sparks rising, the inevitable skim of the house, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: The House Cut
text: Whenever a player rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, you create a Treasure token. The house takes a little off the top of every game. That's just business.
flavorText: Nobody beats the house. The house already counted the money before you sat down.

extras.dice: table-wide skim engine off any roll or flip
